name: Talas Region (Kyrgyzstan)

colors.symbolism: drawn from the Kyrgyz national flag — courage

description: A red field charged centrally with the regional emblem of Talas — featuring stylised mountains and the Manas memorial.
history: Talas Region is the smallest of the seven regions of Kyrgyzstan. It is closely associated in Kyrgyz tradition with the epic of Manas, whose mausoleum is located in the region; the regional flag and emblem reflect this heritage.

features.symbolism: the Manas memorial and the surrounding mountains
